decoder_heading: 5.1 We take appropriate organizational and technical measures to protect the personal data that we have.

heading_content_part: 5.1 We take appropriate organizational and technical measures to protect the personal data that we have. Access to your personal data is obtained only by those persons who, in our opinion, should really familiarize themselves with them as part of their work activities.

By submitting your personal data to us, you consent to such transfer, storage or processing. We will take all reasonable steps necessary to ensure the safety of your personal data in all these cases in accordance with this Privacy Policy.
